rationale: Educ. Code §13.003 governs petition and election procedures for school district elections. It contains no dollar thresholds or homestead exemption references that would be affected by increasing the Tax Code §11.13(b) exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 13.003. PETITION AND ELECTION. (a) Except as otherwise provided by this chapter, this section governs:
_note: No conflict identified. §13.003 is purely procedural regarding petitions and elections; it does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
